error.invalid_public_key: The Starling webhook public key is not a valid PEM public key.

init.description: In Starling Developer Portal, use Show public key for this webhook and paste the complete PEM key here. The integration will reject unsigned or invalid callbacks.
init.title: Verify Starling webhooks
